case_title: FRANKLIN EDDIE VS KENTUCKY FRIED CHICKEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KENTUCKY FRIED CHICKEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY FRANKLIN EDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT KENTUCKY FRIED CHICKEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
